mapper.select: select count(*) from portfolio_items where user_id = #{userId} and is_active = true
mapper.insert: insert into portfolio_items ( user_id, stock_id, daily_invest_amount, holding_quantity, investment_start_date, memo, is_active ) values ( #{userId}, #{request.stockId}, #{request.dailyInvestAmount}, #{request.holdingQuantity}, #{request.investmentStartDate}, #{request.memo}, true )
mapper.update: update portfolio_items set daily_invest_amount = #{request.dailyInvestAmount}, holding_quantity = #{request.holdingQuantity}, investment_start_date = #{request.investmentStartDate}, memo = #{request.memo}, is_active = true, updated_at = now() where id = #{portfolioItemId}
update portfolio_items set is_active = false, updated_at = now() where id = #{portfolioItemId} and user_id = #{userId} and is_active = true
mapper.select: select pi.id, pi.stock_id, coalesce(s.name_ko, s.name_en) as company_name, s.ticker, s.exchange_code, pi.daily_invest_amount, pi.holding_quantity, pi.investment_start_date, pi.memo, s.logo_url from portfolio_items pi join stocks s on s.id = pi.stock_id where pi.user_id = #{userId} and pi.is_active = true order by pi.updated_at desc, pi.created_at desc
